portfolio_rationale: GOOGL leads the ranking with the cleanest bull case: strong technicals (price above 20-day MA, positive MACD, positive 5- and 20-day momentum), solid fundamentals (strong ROE/ROA, positive FCF), and the fewest unresolved risk flags (only front-end inversion, which is shared across all tickers). AAPL is second with equally strong technicals and fundamentals, though its sub-1.0 current ratio is a minor concern. AMZN earns a smaller allocation given its bearish technical picture (price below 20-day MA, negative MACD, negative 20-day momentum) despite strong fundamentals. LLY is deeply oversold with severe negative momentum (-21% 20-day return) and elevated leverage, making it speculative. XOM has weak technicals and limited fundamental data disclosed. BRK.B receives zero weight as the judge explicitly ruled bearish.

GOOGL.reason: Strongest combined bull case: clean technicals with price above 20-day MA, positive MACD and 20-day momentum, strong ROE/ROA, low debt, and fewest risk flags among bullish tickers.

AAPL.reason: Strong technicals (RSI near 70, price well above 20-day MA, high volume ratio) and excellent fundamentals (strong margins, FCF, ROE) with only minor liquidity concern offsetting the bull case.

AMZN.reason: Strong fundamentals and judge bullish at 0.85 confidence, but bearish technical picture (price below 20-day MA, negative MACD, negative 20-day momentum) meaningfully weakens near-term conviction.

LLY.reason: Exceptional revenue growth (37%) and margins support a long-term bull case, but severe near-term technical deterioration (-21% 20-day return, RSI below 30) and elevated leverage warrant a small, speculative position.

XOM.reason: Positive news sentiment and solid FCF provide some support, but weak technicals across all indicators and limited fundamental data disclosed reduce conviction to a minimal allocation.

BRK.B.reason: Judge ruled bearish with 0.85 confidence; negative revenue growth, price below 20-day MA, and weak momentum across all technical indicators preclude any allocation.
